profile.name: Ajay D'Souza
profile.tagline: WordPress developer, blogger, and founder of WebberZone. Building plugins since 2005.
profile.bio: I build WordPress plugins and tools that thousands of sites rely on. I write about WordPress development, productivity, and tech at ajaydsouza.com. When I'm not shipping code, I'm a dad, an investment banker, and a perpetual tinkerer — usually in that order.

links.title: WebberZone
links.description: WordPress plugins for related posts, search, knowledge bases, and more

links.title: Beyond Develop
links.description: Agency behind the WebberZone suite and custom WordPress projects

links.title: My Blog
links.description: Writing about WordPress, productivity, tech, and life
